resource.name: LDAP-IdentityCache-UPeU
resource.description: OpenLDAP Identity Cache UPeU. MidPoint provisiona identidades activas. Keycloak lee via User Federation.

operationalState.message: Status set to UP because resource schema was successfully fetched

operationalStateHistory.message: Status set to UP because resource schema was successfully fetched

objectType.description: Cuenta LDAP de persona activa (lifecycleState=active) proyectada desde MidPoint
